title: Multilingual Content Handling

summaryCharacteristics: Captures the bilingual discussion on launch checklist and RFC

requiredActions.evidence: Priya: Je vais terminer la checklist de lancement.
Rajeev: Yo redactaré el RFC de integración para el viernes.

requiredEvidencePhrases: Priya: Je vais terminer la checklist de lancement.
Yo redactaré el RFC de integración para el viernes.
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Failing to translate French/Spanish action descriptions into English
Mismatched owners due to language parsing errors

scoringNotes: Verify that the model translates foreign-language speaker turns to standard English for descriptions and summary, while preserving raw evidence verbatim.
